description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3.5.0-jdk-9-slim Docker image and defines a single stage named test. Add a job called test that runs in the test stage, executes the commands mvn test --batch-mode and then cat target/site/jacoco/index.html, and is limited to the master and develop branches via only rules. No services, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are required. Ensure the pipeline respects the specified stage ordering and branch restrictions.
